sourcesContent:
# composition matrix rows for value-usage lowerings: statement
# constructs in expression and tail positions — if→ternary (simple) and
# IIFE (multi-statement), try/switch→IIFE with returns, loops→
# accumulator IIFEs, postfix-if-ELSE ternaries with the assignment
# hoist, statement-position comprehensions — instantiated so every row
# evals.
flag = true
n = 7

t1 = if flag then 1 else 2
t2 = if flag then 1
t3 = unless flag then 1 else 2
t4 = if n > 5 then "big" else if n > 2 then "mid" else "small"
t5 = (if flag then 1 else 2) + 3
t6 = [if flag then 10 else 20, 30]

seen = ""
m1 = if flag
  seen += "a"
  n + 1
else
  0

p1 = 5 if flag else 6
p2 = (n + 1) if n > 100 else (n - 1)
double = (x) -> x * 2
p3 = double n if flag else 0

risky = -> throw "bad"
tv = try
  risky()
catch e
  "caught"

sw = switch n
  when 7 then "seven"
  else "other"

i = 0
acc = while i < 3
  i += 1
  i * 10

evens = for v in [1, 2, 3, 4]
  v * 2

lp = loop
  break

sum = 0
tally = (v) -> sum += v
tally v for v in [1, 2, 3]

tailIf = (v) ->
  if v > 0
    "pos"
  else
    "neg"

tailMulti = (v) ->
  if v > 0
    w = v * 2
    w + 1
  else
    0

tailTry = ->
  try
    risky()
  catch e
    42

tailSwitch = (v) ->
  switch v
    when 7 then "lucky"
    else "plain"

tailFor = (xs) ->
  for x in xs
    x + 100

results = [t1, t2, t3, t4, t5, m1, p1, p2, p3, tv, sw, acc, evens, sum, tailIf(n), tailMulti(2), tailTry(), tailSwitch(7), tailFor([1])]
